body:
Using the timestep wizard when $\kappa$ is a tuple of anything but numbers does not work, with this change it can be something else e.g. `FunctionFields`.

@glwagner this (+ changing to function fields) replaces the problem in https://github.com/OceanBioME/OceanBioME.jl/issues/142.
title: (0.89.1) Make maximum numeric diffusivity more generic for named tuples of diffusivity
